name: control-room
description: Live agent-dispatch dashboard. Observer hooks (PreToolUse/PostToolUse on Agent|Task + session events) append to ~/.claude/control-room/events.jsonl; a zero-dependency local server streams them over SSE to a Control Room Live radial map — dispatched agents pulse, run with elapsed timers, and land in a real dispatch feed. Fail-open: the observer never blocks a session. Localhost only.
